---
title: "About"
image: bass.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
---

This blog serves as a place for me to post written pieces, videos, and code for whatever project I want to share.

Here is good goth song.
